title: Gencraft Studio SSoT Document Frontmatter Schema
description: Defines the mandatory structure and data types for the YAML frontmatter of all official SSoT Markdown documents. This schema is used by the Global SSoT Linter.

docId.description: The unique, immutable identifier for the document. Format: DOMAIN-TYPE[-SUBSYSTEM[-SUBSYSTEM2]]-NNN (e.g. ENG-SPEC-008, GOV-GUIDE-HG-001, GOV-GUIDE-HG-AC-005).

title.description: The official, human-readable title of the document.

version.description: The semantic version of the document.

creation_date.description: The date when the document was initially created.

last_updated_date.description: The date of the last significant update to the document.

authors.description: A list of the primary authors or contributors.

knowledgeGuardian.description: The designated Gem or Crew responsible for the long-term accuracy of the document.

ssot_path.description: The fully qualified, permanent URL to this document on the main branch of its host repository.

metadata.description: The mandatory block for all classification metadata.

lifecycle-stage.description: The current stage of the artifact in our value chain.

scope.description: The scope of the document (e.g., studio, project-aethel, platform).

domain.description: The primary functional or business area this document belongs to.

doc-type.description: The specific archetype or form of the document (e.g., standard, guide).

intended-audience.description: A list of primary target audiences for the document. Values must be kebab-case strings from the taxonomy.

security-classification.description: The confidentiality level of the document's content. Must be an underscore-delimited string from the taxonomy (e.g. l0_public, l1_internal, l2_confidential, l3_secret).

keywords.description: A list of search keywords for the document.
